Splash.title: OBIGBO
Splash.subtitle: Welcome Home
Splash.tagline: A place of belonging for the Igbo community worldwide
Splash.stat1: Growing community of Igbo people worldwide

About.title: About OBIGBO
About.missionText: OBIGBO is a digital home for the global Igbo community. We connect Igbo people worldwide, preserving our rich cultural heritage while building bridges across generations and geographies.
About.visionText: A world where every Igbo person, no matter where they are, feels connected to their roots and empowered by their community.
About.cultureText: The Igbo people are one of the largest ethnic groups in Africa, with a vibrant diaspora spanning every continent. OBIGBO brings us together in a space that celebrates our language, traditions, and shared values of community, enterprise, and resilience.
About.foundingText: OBIGBO was born from a simple observation: while Igbo people thrive individually across the globe, we lack a dedicated digital space to connect, share, and grow together as a community. This platform is our answer to that need.
About.ctaText: Be part of a growing network of Igbo people connecting, sharing, and preserving our culture together.

Articles.title: Articles
Articles.description: Discover stories, insights, and cultural perspectives from the Igbo community.

Apply.title: Join OBIGBO
Apply.heading: Become a Member
Apply.description: Tell us about yourself and your connection to the Igbo community.

fields.name: Full Name
fields.culturalConnectionHelp: Describe your connection to Igbo culture and heritage
fields.reasonForJoiningHelp: Tell us why you want to join the community (min 10 characters)
fields.referralNameHelp: Name of the current member who referred you (if any)
fields.consent: I consent to the processing of my personal data as described in the Privacy Policy

errors.consentRequired: You must consent to the Privacy Policy to submit your application

confirmation.title: Check your email

confirmation.resendPrompt: Didn't receive the email? Enter your email to resend:

confirmation.resendRateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later.

emailVerified.title: Email Verified!
emailVerified.description: Your email is verified! A community admin will review your application. Welcome home soon.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.heading: Terms of Service
Terms.content: Our full terms of service are being finalized and will be published here soon. By using this platform, you agree to engage respectfully with fellow community members and abide by our community guidelines.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
Privacy.content: Our full privacy policy is being finalized and will be published here soon. We are committed to protecting your personal data and complying with applicable data protection regulations including GDPR.
